# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary codebase insight documents generated alongside the AppCAT assessment for the **Photo Album** Java application. Use the links below to navigate each analysis area.

> **Note:** These documents are generated by AI and may contain inaccuracies or incomplete information. Please review carefully.

## Supplementary Documents

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Architecture Diagram](architecture-diagram.md) | High-level application architecture (layers, data storage, external dependencies) and detailed component relationship diagram showing Spring MVC controllers, services, repositories, and models |
| [Dependency Map](dependency-map.md) | Visual map of all declared external dependencies grouped by category (Web Frameworks, Database/ORM, Utilities), with version compatibility risks and notable observations |
| [API & Service Contracts](api-service-contracts.md) | Full inventory of HTTP endpoints, DTOs and request/response contracts, communication patterns, security posture, and a sequence diagram of the primary request flows |
| [Data Architecture](data-architecture.md) | Database configuration per profile, the JPA entity model (ER diagram), repository methods (including Oracle-native queries), caching strategy, data ownership boundaries, and data classification |
| [Configuration Inventory](configuration-inventory.md) | All configuration sources, runtime profiles, properties inventory, startup parameters, startup dependency chain, secrets and sensitive configuration, and framework/runtime versions |
| [Business Workflows](business-workflows.md) | Domain entity descriptions, primary business workflows (upload, gallery browse, detail view, file serving, deletion), business rules and decision logic, and a sequence diagram of the photo upload workflow |
